name: Performance Rubric
description: Evaluates fix quality for algorithmic efficiency and resource usage

criteria.name: Algorithmic Complexity
criteria.description: Fix does not worsen time or space complexity of the code path

criteria.name: Resource Efficiency
criteria.description: Fix avoids unnecessary allocations, I/O calls, or redundant computation

criteria.name: Completeness
criteria.description: Fix addresses the performance bottleneck identified in the analysis
